_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors

_contextSnippet: eight PDXs [JH-2-002, JH-2-031, JH-2-079c, WU-225, WU-386, WU-545, MN-2, and MN-3-002] were generated in our laboratories
details: JH-2-079-c PDX (referenced as JH-2-079c in this publication) included among eight MPNST PDX models generated and used in an AAV vector gene replacement therapy study for NF1-related tumors
